_comment: Query-count baselines for performance regression tests.
Each key is a test function name (without the test_ prefix).
queries  — maximum allowed query count (fail above this)
notes    — why this number, when it was last measured
2. If a test fails, the error message shows the actual count.
3. If the regression is intentional (e.g. new feature), update
the 'queries' value here and commit with the code change.
4. If unintentional, fix the N+1 or missing joinedload first.
Baselines set at ~50% headroom above measured values (2025-04-16).
Tight enough to catch N+1 regressions, loose enough to tolerate
minor data-shape variation across snapshot refreshes.

get_user_dashboard_data.notes: measured 26 (multi-project user) — primary target of ORM perf push

get_project_dashboard_data.notes: measured 45 — single-project path, many eager loads

get_fstree_data.notes: measured 3 — most expensive by wall time, few queries

get_allocation_summary.notes: measured 2 — heavy aggregation in single SQL

get_detailed_allocation_usage.notes: measured 37 — Project instance method, varies with allocation count

get_allocation_summary_with_usage_all_re.notes: measured 44 (18 resources, 4189 rows) — was 52,923 before Issue 1 fix

user_dashboard_route.notes: measured 45 — full GET /user/ including template render (benkirk)

allocations_index_route.notes: measured 55 — full GET /allocations/; was 52,923 before Issue 1 fix. show_usage toggle removed 2026-04-19 — usage pipeline now always runs (previously gated; measured 13 when gated off, 54 when gated on).

admin_orgs_card_route.notes: measured 311 — full GET /admin/htmx/organizations-card; residual lazy loads in template

admin_institutions_users_projects_route.notes: measured 130 — full GET /admin/htmx/institutions-fragment?show_users_projects=1; selectinload chunks × 1367 institutions × users × (led_projects + admin_projects)

get_institutions_with_members_include_pr.notes: measured 119 — function-level with include_projects=True; selectinload chunking across 1367 institutions

fstree_api_route.notes: measured 44 — full GET /api/v1/fstree_access/ (all resources); cached 5min in prod
